articles.title: Stock futures rise as traders look ahead to Federal Reserve interest rate decision: Live updates - CNBC
articles.description: The three major averages posted back-to-back gains on Tuesday, even as oil prices ended the session higher. Traders are now awaiting the Fed's policy decision.

articles.title: Trump’s tariffs were supposed to help manufacturers. But instead, they’re hurting - AP News
articles.description: There’s a growing body of data showing that the tariffs President Donald Trump said would help American factories are, in fact, squashing many of them. Take, for example, Allen Engineering, which makes industrial equipment in northeast Arkansas. Jay Allen say…

articles.title: He spent $69 million on an NFT. Five years on, he believes in digital art more than ever - CNN
articles.description: It was the third-highest sum ever paid at auction for the work of a living artist. But following the NFT market’s spectacular collapse, is Vignesh Sundaresan’s record purchase worth anything at all?

articles.title: Arizona AG files criminal charges against Kalshi over 'illegal gambling' - NPR
articles.description: Arizona is the first state to allege the prediction market company has committed criminal violations, accusing it of running an unlicensed gambling operation.

articles.title: What $5 diesel fuel means for the U.S. economy - Axios
articles.description: The price of diesel fuel creates new inflationary pressure on anything Americans buy that relies on truck transport.

articles.title: Bank of America settles lawsuit brought on behalf of Jeffrey Epstein victims - PBS
articles.description: Bank of America has tentatively settled a lawsuit claiming it ignored suspicious financial transactions involving Jeffrey Epstein while he was sexually abusing hundreds of girls and women.

articles.title: Lululemon Gives Weak Sales Outlook, Adding to Company’s Troubles (LULU) - Bloomberg.com
articles.description: Struggling retailer Lululemon Athletica Inc. forecast a second-straight year of profit declines, further pressuring a brand that’s dealing with product mishaps while searching for a new chief executive officer.

articles.title: Allina Health to be acquired by California-based Sutter Health - 5 EYEWITNESS NEWS
articles.description: Allina Health, one of the largest health care providers in Minnesota, is being bought out by California-based Sutter Health, the health systems announced on Tuesday.

articles.title: ‘He just sat there in flames’: Sole survivor of Piedmont Cybertruck crash sues Tesla - San Francisco Chronicle
articles.description: The sole survivor of the Piedmont Cybertruck crash sues Tesla, alleging the vehicle's design didn't allow a reasonable way to exit during the emergency.

articles.title: US drivers see gas prices jump to their highest level since 2023 as the Iran war drags on - AP News

articles.title: ‘Two sets of books’: Croft School rocked by $13M hidden debt - WPRI.com
articles.description: The Providence private school’s board says its founder had been misrepresenting finances for years.

articles.title: USPS cutting delivery days ‘on the table,’ as agency runs out of cash, postmaster general tells lawmakers - Federal News Network
articles.description: Several House Republicans who played a critical role in passing reform legislation in 2022 said they were skeptical of providing further assistance to USPS.

articles.title: Elon Musk’s lawyers sidestepped SEC team in Twitter case settlement talks - Financial Times
